title: Bridge Essay: Heartfulness Meditation Alters Electroencephalogram Oscillations: An Electroence

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Heartfulness Meditation Alters Electroencephalogram Oscillations: An Electroencephalogram Study.** — Int J Yoga. PMID: 36949832. DOI: 10.4103/ijoy.ijoy_138_22. Heartfulness meditation (HM) has been shown to have positive impacts on cognition and well-being, which makes it important to look into the neurophysiological mechanisms underlying the phenomenon. Across-sectional study was conducted on HM meditators and nonmeditators to assess frontal electrical activities of the brain and self-reported anxiety and mindfulness.
